data.name: SEX ORCgasm
data.detailed_description:
He said he'd sack the village. This time, he brought the bass – and a battering ram. SEX ORCgasm isn't a 100-hour RPG; it's a straightforward, banging arcade game that doesn't waste your time. We kept it simple: catchy beats, bouncy animations, and zero grinding. It’s a snack-sized ticket to a good time—tap the rhythm, watch the girls wiggle, and unlock the goods. Perfect for when you want a quick session with good tunes and even better views. No complex skill trees, just rhythm and release.

🛡️ Highlights:

  • Straight to the Point: A classic arcade experience designed for quick fun and visual rewards.

  • The Music Slaps: We focused on the vibes. Enjoy a catchy, high-energy soundtrack that hits harder than an Orc chieftain.

  • Nice Views: Unlock high-quality artwork and short, spicy animated loops that get the job done.

  • Chill & Spill: Simple controls, no stress. Just sit back, one hand on the mouse, and enjoy the show.

data.short_description: Me Orc-Gruk smash out rhythm game for elf-lovers like you! Tap-tap-tap to thumping beat, make pointy-ear girls wiggle wild and unlock steamy adult bang-fest. All-new soundtrack slap like orc club to elf butt, perfect groove for your... special rhythm sessions!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:

  • Processor: Dual-core 2.0 GHz

  • DirectX: Version 10
